video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. 镜中人无声说话，唇形清晰：把记忆还给我, 主角林澈震惊地看着镜子. Narration: "镜中人说不出声音，但唇形清楚：把记忆还给我。". Protagonist A says: "你不是我。". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up on a mirror in a dim kitchen, reflection of protagonist A with intense expression, lips forming words silently, dramatic lighting, cinematic, horror undertone. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S036/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
